blocks.body: Past Continuous: Forms and Use — was / were + verb-ing dla czynności trwających w przeszłości.

{"level":"A2","intro":"W Past Continuous używamy was / were + verb-ing do czynności, które trwały w pewnym momencie w przeszłości.","rules":[{"label":"was / were + verb-ing","color":"emerald","text":"Ten czas używa przeszłej formy be i czasownika z -ing.","example":"I was reading. / They were waiting."},{"label":"Moment in the past","color":"blue","text":"Ten czas często pokazuje czynność w konkretnym momencie w przeszłości.","example":"We were studying at 8 p.m."},{"label":"Background action","color":"amber","text":"Używaj go jako tła dla innego wydarzenia.","example":"She was cooking when I called."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowy wzór","intro":"Zapamiętaj formę dla każdej grupy podmiotów.","items":[{"label":"I / He / She / It","title":"was + verb-ing","subtitle":"I was reading. / He was sleeping. / It was raining."},{"label":"You / We / They","title":"were + verb-ing","subtitle":"You were listening. / We were waiting. / They were coming."},{"label":"Spelling","title":"write → writing / run → running","subtitle":"Forma -ing działa tak samo jak w Present Continuous."},{"label":"Time point","title":"at 7 p.m. / at that moment","subtitle":"Te wyrażenia często pojawiają się z Past Continuous."}]}

{"title":"2. Kiedy używamy Past Continuous","sections":[{"label":"Czynność w momencie w przeszłości","color":"emerald","description":"Pokaż, że czynność trwała w określonym momencie w przeszłości.","examples":[{"en":"I was doing my homework at 9 o'clock.","ua":"Czynność trwała o tej porze."},{"en":"They were sleeping at midnight.","ua":"Czynność nadal trwała wtedy."}]},{"label":"Tło dla wydarzenia","color":"blue","description":"Jedna czynność trwała, gdy wydarzyła się inna krótka czynność.","examples":[{"en":"She was reading when the phone rang.","ua":"Telefon przerwał czynność."},{"en":"We were walking when it started to snow.","ua":"Jedna czynność trwała, a potem wydarzyła się druga."}]},{"label":"Tymczasowa czynność w przeszłości","color":"amber","description":"Pokaż czynność, która trwała przez jakiś czas w przeszłości.","examples":[{"en":"He was working all evening.","ua":"Dłuższa czynność w przeszłości."},{"en":"I was staying with my cousin that week.","ua":"Tymczasowa sytuacja w przeszłości."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Szybkie sprawdzenie formy","intro":"Jeden model z was / were i -ing dla wszystkich podmiotów.","rows":[{"en":"I was writing an email.","ua":"was + writing","note":"I + was + verb-ing"},{"en":"She was watching TV.","ua":"was + watching","note":"she + was + verb-ing"},{"en":"We were waiting outside.","ua":"were + waiting","note":"we + were + verb-ing"},{"en":"They were coming home.","ua":"were + coming","note":"they + were + verb-ing"}],"warning":"Nie mów I was read ani They was waiting."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Używanie formy podstawowej zamiast -ing.","wrong":"❌ I was read a book.","right":"✅ I was reading a book."},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Używanie was z they / we / you.","wrong":"❌ They was waiting for us.","right":"✅ They were waiting for us."},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Pomijanie be w przeszłości.","wrong":"❌ She cooking when I came in.","right":"✅ She was cooking when I came in."}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Past Continuous = was / were + verb-ing.","Używaj was z I / he / she / it.","Używaj were z you / we / they.","Ten czas służy do czynności trwających w pewnym momencie w przeszłości.","Często jest tłem dla innego krótkiego wydarzenia."]}
